**VALIDATION: PASS** - Found new content in memory/2026-03-05.md

Added to SKILLS.md from Mar 5:

1. **Agent Shadow Phase 5** - Updated deployment command, verified self-improvement loop operational
2. **Memory System Failure Anti-Pattern** (CRITICAL) - New forbidden move: session hooks can silently fail and capture only cron prompts, not user messages. Entire day lost until manual recount.
3. **MaxClaw Integration** - agent.minimax.io setup, shared memory pattern, verified seamless proxy
4. **GitHub Mirror** - github.com/dptekippe/Roger-mirror sync pattern

The memory failure is the most critical - this is a major lesson about not trusting hooks blindly.
